pilot_experiments.name: Pilot: Activation Patching Validation
pilot_experiments.objective: Validate 9 persistent core words using activation patching. Zero child feature -> measure parent recovery. Tests whether persistent words are genuine absorption or metric artifact.
pilot_experiments.hypothesis_tested: H4 persistence (hierarchy-driven absorption vs metric artifact)
pilot_experiments.description: CRITICAL VALIDATION: This is the ONLY experiment that can distinguish 'metric miscalibrated' from 'JumpReLU genuinely has minimal absorption'. Never executed in 3 consecutive iterations despite being recommended.
pilot_experiments.failure_action: If all 9 words show zero recovery: report as metric artifact confirmed; update paper narrative to remove hierarchy claims

next_steps.refine: Reduce to 3 most confident core words; increase samples to 200
next_steps.pivot: Report as metric artifact; reframe as 'persistence does not imply hierarchy'

pilot_experiments.name: Pilot: Steering Effectiveness by CV
pilot_experiments.objective: Test whether CV predicts steering effectiveness. Compare steering on 10 high-CV vs 10 low-CV features.
pilot_experiments.hypothesis_tested: H4 (variance paradox) -> actionability connection; tests Basu et al. actionability paradox
pilot_experiments.description: Connects H4 variance paradox to steering actionability. High-CV features (absorbed) may route through specialized child channels that resist steering.
pilot_experiments.failure_action: If no difference: report as actionability paradox confirmed; aligns with Basu et al. finding of 98.2% AUROC but 0% output change

next_steps.go: Proceed to full_steering_cv with 30 vs 30 features and multiple steering strengths
next_steps.refine: Focus on high-CV absorbed features only vs non-absorbed baseline
next_steps.pivot: Report as actionability paradox confirmed; connect to Basu et al.

activation_patching.strong_go: At least 5/9 words show >30% parent recovery
activation_patching.go: At least 3/9 words show >10% parent recovery
activation_patching.refine: At least 1/9 words show >10% recovery but high variance

steering_cv.strong_go: High-CV group shows >2x steering effect of low-CV group
steering_cv.go: High-CV group shows >1.5x steering effect of low-CV group
steering_cv.refine: High-CV group shows >1.2x effect but high variance
steering_cv.pivot: No difference between groups (actionability paradox confirmed)

iteration_2_lessons_applied: Activation Patching UNEXECUTED for 3 consecutive reviews - this is the ONLY experiment that distinguishes metric artifact from genuine absorption
H10 (Homeostatic Rebalancing) is a phantom contribution - never executed but appears as key contribution in Section 1.4 and abstract
LCA Framework logical incoherence - H6 falsified (precision@20=0.0) but paper claims support from H7 precision-recall asymmetry
All 4 supported hypotheses (H1,H2,H4,H5) have strong empirical backing - focus on validation now
H6 OrtSAE ablation compares unmatched L0 values (0.230 at L0~920 vs 0.247 at L0~550) - confound the paper criticizes elsewhere
